Application Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 340.1 For An Order To Name And Serve Doe Defendants; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JANE DOE K.M.'s Application Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 340.1 For An Order To Name And Serve Doe Defendants.

Plaintiff's unopposed CCP 340.1 motion for order to name and serve Doe defendants is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
